workExperiences.title: Software Developer - Fuel Cell Store
workExperiences.description1: Sole developer for an end-to-end ERP/MES-style platform, independently architecting a 50+ table relational database schema and 100,000+ line codebase supporting order processing, lot-level material traceability, and fuel cell manufacturing workflows.
workExperiences.description2: Led the live OpenCart 1.5 to 3.0 e-commerce migration for 2,000+ products and 70,000+ historical orders, including custom SQL migration scripts, UI redesign, and zero data loss.
workExperiences.description3: Built and maintained REST APIs, optimized SQL and reporting workflows, stabilized production systems, and used AI-assisted development tools to shorten delivery cycles.

workExperiences.title: Software Engineering Intern - DigiFinex
workExperiences.description1: Collaborated with product managers and senior engineers to design, analyze, and implement system features aligned with business requirements.
workExperiences.description2: Contributed to interface protocols, technical documentation, and API integrations for trading-platform workflows.
workExperiences.description3: Developed and tested frontend and backend components to improve system reliability and performance.

workExperiences.title: 软件开发工程师 - Fuel Cell Store
workExperiences.description1: 作为唯一开发者，独立架构并持续开发端到端 ERP/MES 平台，包含 50+ 张关系型数据库表和 10 万+ 行代码，支撑订单处理、批次级物料追溯和燃料电池制造流程。
workExperiences.description2: 主导线上电商平台从 OpenCart 1.5 升级到 3.0，迁移 2,000+ 商品和 70,000+ 历史订单，编写自定义 SQL 迁移脚本，完成界面重设计，并实现零数据丢失。
workExperiences.description3: 开发并维护 REST API，优化 SQL 查询和报表流程，诊断并稳定生产系统，同时结合 AI 辅助开发工具缩短功能交付周期。

workExperiences.title: 软件工程实习生 - DigiFinex
workExperiences.description1: 与产品经理和资深工程师协作，根据业务需求设计、分析并实现系统功能。
workExperiences.description2: 参与交易平台接口协议、技术文档和 API 集成相关工作。
workExperiences.description3: 开发并测试前端和后端组件，提升系统可靠性与性能表现。
